attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT SMET.TRANSACTION_ID, SMET.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, SMET.LAST_UPDATED_BY, SMET.CREATION_DATE, SMET.CREATED_BY, SMET.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, SMET.ORGANIZATION_ID, CAST(SMET.TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID AS BIGINT), SMET.TRANSACTION_ACTION_ID, SMET.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_ID, SMET.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY, SMET.TRANSACTION_UOM, SMET.PRIMARY_QUANTITY, SMET.TRANSACTION_DATE, SMET.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, SMET.REQUEST_ID, SMET.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, SMET.PROGRAM_ID, SMET.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, SMET.REVISION, SMET.SUBINVENTORY_CODE, SMET.LOCATOR_ID, SMET.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_ID, SMET.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_NAME, SMET.VARIANCE_AMOUNT, SMET.ACCT_PERIOD_ID, SMET.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE, SMET.REASON_ID, SMET.DISTRIBUTION_ACCOUNT_ID, SMET.ENCUMBRANCE_ACCOUNT, SMET.ENCUMBRANCE_AMOUNT, SMET.COST_UPDATE_ID, SMET.COSTED_FLAG, SMET.TRANSACTION_GROUP_ID, SMET.INVOICED_FLAG, SMET.ACTUAL_COST, SMET.TRANSACTION_COST, SMET.PRIOR_COST, SMET.NEW_COST, SMET.CURRENCY_CODE, SMET.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE, SMET.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_TYPE, SMET.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_DATE, SMET.USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE, SMET.QUANTITY_ADJUSTED, SMET.EMPLOYEE_CODE, SMET.DEPARTMENT_ID, SMET.OPERATION_SEQ_NUM, SMET.MASTER_SCHEDULE_UPDATE_CODE, SMET.RECEIVING_DOCUMENT, SMET.PICKING_LINE_ID, CAST(SMET.TRX_SOURCE_LINE_ID AS BIGINT), SMET.TRX_SOURCE_DELIVERY_ID, SMET.REPETITIVE_LINE_ID, SMET.PHYSICAL_ADJUSTMENT_ID, CAST(SMET.CYCLE_COUNT_ID AS BIGINT), SMET.RMA_LINE_ID, SMET.TRANSFER_TRANSACTION_ID, SMET.TRANSACTION_SET_ID, SMET.RCV_TRANSACTION_ID, SMET.MOVE_TRANSACTION_ID, SMET.COMPLETION_TRANSACTION_ID, SMET.SHORTAGE_PROCESS_CODE, SMET.SOURCE_CODE, CAST(SMET.SOURCE_LINE_ID AS BIGINT), SMET.VENDOR_LOT_NUMBER, SMET.TRANSFER_ORGANIZATION_ID, SMET.TRANSFER_SUBINVENTORY, SMET.TRANSFER_LOCATOR_ID, SMET.SHIPMENT_NUMBER, SMET.TRANSFER_COST, SMET.TRANSPORTATION_DIST_ACCOUNT, SMET.TRANSPORTATION_COST, SMET.TRANSFER_COST_DIST_ACCOUNT, SMET.WAYBILL_AIRBILL, SMET.FREIGHT_CODE, SMET.NUMBER_OF_CONTAINERS, SMET.VALUE_CHANGE, SMET.PERCENTAGE_CHANGE, SMET.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, SMET.ATTRIBUTE1, SMET.ATTRIBUTE2, SMET.ATTRIBUTE3, SMET.ATTRIBUTE4, SMET.ATTRIBUTE5, SMET.ATTRIBUTE6, SMET.ATTRIBUTE7, SMET.ATTRIBUTE8, SMET.ATTRIBUTE9, SMET.ATTRIBUTE10, SMET.ATTRIBUTE11, SMET.ATTRIBUTE12, SMET.ATTRIBUTE13, SMET.ATTRIBUTE14, SMET.ATTRIBUTE15, SMET.MOVEMENT_ID, SMET.TASK_ID, SMET.TO_TASK_ID, SMET.PROJECT_ID, SMET.TO_PROJECT_ID, SMET.SOURCE_PROJECT_ID, SMET.PA_EXPENDITURE_ORG_ID, SMET.SOURCE_TASK_ID, SMET.EXPENDITURE_TYPE, SMET.ERROR_CODE, SMET.ERROR_EXPLANATION, SMET.PRIOR_COSTED_QUANTITY, SMET.TRANSFER_PRIOR_COSTED_QUANTITY, SMET.FINAL_COMPLETION_FLAG, SMET.PM_COST_COLLECTED, SMET.PM_COST_COLLECTOR_GROUP_ID, SMET.SHIPMENT_COSTED, SMET.TRANSFER_PERCENTAGE, SMET.MATERIAL_ACCOUNT, SMET.MATERIAL_OVERHEAD_ACCOUNT, SMET.RESOURCE_ACCOUNT, SMET.OUTSIDE_PROCESSING_ACCOUNT, SMET.OVERHEAD_ACCOUNT, SMET.COST_GROUP_ID, SMET.TRANSFER_COST_GROUP_ID, SMET.FLOW_SCHEDULE, SMET.QA_COLLECTION_ID, SMET.OVERCOMPLETION_TRANSACTION_QTY, SMET.OVERCOMPLETION_PRIMARY_QTY, SMET.OVERCOMPLETION_TRANSACTION_ID, SMET.MVT_STAT_STATUS, SMET.COMMON_BOM_SEQ_ID, SMET.COMMON_ROUTING_SEQ_ID, SMET.ORG_COST_GROUP_ID, SMET.COST_TYPE_ID, SMET.PERIODIC_PRIMARY_QUANTITY, SMET.MOVE_ORDER_LINE_ID, SMET.TASK_GROUP_ID, SMET.PICK_SLIP_NUMBER, SMET.LPN_ID, SMET.TRANSFER_LPN_ID, SMET.PICK_STRATEGY_ID, SMET.PICK_RULE_ID, SMET.PUT_AWAY_STRATEGY_ID, SMET.PUT_AWAY_RULE_ID, SMET.CONTENT_LPN_ID, SMET.PICK_SLIP_DATE, SMET.COST_CATEGORY_ID, SMET.ORGANIZATION_TYPE, SMET.TRANSFER_ORGANIZATION_TYPE, SMET.OWNING_ORGANIZATION_ID, SMET.OWNING_TP_TYPE, SMET.XFR_OWNING_ORGANIZATION_ID, SMET.TRANSFER_OWNING_TP_TYPE, SMET.PLANNING_ORGANIZATION_ID, SMET.PLANNING_TP_TYPE, SMET.XFR_PLANNING_ORGANIZATION_ID, SMET.TRANSFER_PLANNING_TP_TYPE, SMET.SECONDARY_UOM_CODE, SMET.SECONDARY_TRANSACTION_QUANTITY, SMET.TRANSACTION_GROUP_SEQ, SMET.SHIP_TO_LOCATION_ID, SMET.RESERVATION_ID, SMET.TRANSACTION_MODE, SMET.TRANSACTION_BATCH_ID, CAST(SMET.TRANSACTION_BATCH_SEQ AS BIGINT), SMET.INTRANSIT_ACCOUNT, SMET.FOB_POINT, SMET.PARENT_TRANSACTION_ID, SMET.LOGICAL_TRX_TYPE_CODE, SMET.TRX_FLOW_HEADER_ID, SMET.LOGICAL_TRANSACTIONS_CREATED, SMET.LOGICAL_TRANSACTION, SMET.INTERCOMPANY_COST, SMET.INTERCOMPANY_PRICING_OPTION, SMET.INTERCOMPANY_CURRENCY_CODE, SMET.ORIGINAL_TRANSACTION_TEMP_ID, SMET.TRANSFER_PRICE, SMET.EXPENSE_ACCOUNT_ID, SMET.COGS_RECOGNITION_PERCENT, SMET.SO_ISSUE_ACCOUNT_TYPE, SMET.OPM_COSTED_FLAG, SMET.MATERIAL_EXPENSE_ACCOUNT, SMET.TRANSACTION_EXTRACTED, SMET.XML_DOCUMENT_ID,
SMET.GLOBAL_NAME, SOURCE_DML_TYPE, SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, REFRESH_DATETIME, 
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_MTL_MATERIAL_TRANSACTI SMET
WHERE
 NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
WHERE SMET.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME )
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRNSCTN_SOURCE_TYPE NMTST
WHERE SMET.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_ID = NMTST.SK_TRNSCTN_SOURCE_TYPE_ID_INT)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_TYPE NMTT
WHERE SMET.TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID = NMTT.SK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID_INT)
OR NOT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT  NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME, SM.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION SM, $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC  
WHERE  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SM.SS_CD ) SMT
WHERE SMET.TRANSACTION_ID = SMT.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT 	AND SMT.GLOBAL_NAME  =  SMET.GLOBAL_NAME )
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO   
WHERE	SMET.ORGANIZATION_ID = NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
AND NCIO.SS_CODE IN ('CG'))
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM   (SELECT SK_PURCHASE_ORDR_HEADER_ID_INT, NPO.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY, NPO.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM, NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
        FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER NPO , $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC  WHERE  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NPO.SS_CD )POK
		WHERE SMET.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_ID = POK.SK_PURCHASE_ORDR_HEADER_ID_INT AND SMET.GLOBAL_NAME=POK.GLOBAL_NAME  )
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT ELT1.LINE_ID, ELT1.GLOBAL_NAME, ELT2.CMS_SOURCE_CODE,ELT2.CMS_SOURCE_LINE_ID ,NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LINES_EXT ELT1
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LINES_EXT ELT2
ON  COALESCE(ELT1.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID, ELT1.LINE_ID) = ELT2.LINE_ID
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSCC
ON ( NSSCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = (  CASE WHEN ELT2.CMS_SOURCE_CODE = 'SJOE.CISCO.COM' THEN  'QTC' 
WHEN  ELT2.CMS_SOURCE_CODE= 'BV.CISCO.COM' THEN  'BV' ELSE  'CG'  END ))
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL 
ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = COALESCE(ELT2.CMS_SOURCE_LINE_ID,ELT2.LINE_ID)  
AND NSOL.SS_CODE =  NSSCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
) SOL
WHERE  SOL.LINE_ID = SMET.TRX_SOURCE_LINE_ID  AND SOL.GLOBAL_NAME = SMET.GLOBAL_NAME)
OR NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RECEIVING_TRANSACTION NRT
WHERE SMET.RCV_TRANSACTION_ID=SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
AND NRT.SS_CD IN ('CG')
AND SMET.RCV_TRANSACTION_ID IS NOT NULL)

UNION ALL 

SELECT SMET.TRANSACTION_ID, SMET.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, SMET.LAST_UPDATED_BY, SMET.CREATION_DATE, SMET.CREATED_BY, SMET.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, SMET.ORGANIZATION_ID, SMET.TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID, SMET.TRANSACTION_ACTION_ID, SMET.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_ID, SMET.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY, SMET.TRANSACTION_UOM, SMET.PRIMARY_QUANTITY, SMET.TRANSACTION_DATE, SMET.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, SMET.REQUEST_ID, SMET.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, SMET.PROGRAM_ID, SMET.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, SMET.REVISION, SMET.SUBINVENTORY_CODE, SMET.LOCATOR_ID, SMET.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_ID, SMET.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_NAME, SMET.VARIANCE_AMOUNT, SMET.ACCT_PERIOD_ID, SMET.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE, SMET.REASON_ID, SMET.DISTRIBUTION_ACCOUNT_ID, SMET.ENCUMBRANCE_ACCOUNT, SMET.ENCUMBRANCE_AMOUNT, SMET.COST_UPDATE_ID, SMET.COSTED_FLAG, SMET.TRANSACTION_GROUP_ID, SMET.INVOICED_FLAG, SMET.ACTUAL_COST, SMET.TRANSACTION_COST, SMET.PRIOR_COST, SMET.NEW_COST, SMET.CURRENCY_CODE, SMET.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE, SMET.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_TYPE, SMET.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_DATE, SMET.USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE, SMET.QUANTITY_ADJUSTED, SMET.EMPLOYEE_CODE, SMET.DEPARTMENT_ID, SMET.OPERATION_SEQ_NUM, SMET.MASTER_SCHEDULE_UPDATE_CODE, SMET.RECEIVING_DOCUMENT, SMET.PICKING_LINE_ID, SMET.TRX_SOURCE_LINE_ID, SMET.TRX_SOURCE_DELIVERY_ID, SMET.REPETITIVE_LINE_ID, SMET.PHYSICAL_ADJUSTMENT_ID, SMET.CYCLE_COUNT_ID, SMET.RMA_LINE_ID, SMET.TRANSFER_TRANSACTION_ID, SMET.TRANSACTION_SET_ID, SMET.RCV_TRANSACTION_ID, SMET.MOVE_TRANSACTION_ID, SMET.COMPLETION_TRANSACTION_ID, SMET.SHORTAGE_PROCESS_CODE, SMET.SOURCE_CODE, SMET.SOURCE_LINE_ID, SMET.VENDOR_LOT_NUMBER, SMET.TRANSFER_ORGANIZATION_ID, SMET.TRANSFER_SUBINVENTORY, SMET.TRANSFER_LOCATOR_ID, SMET.SHIPMENT_NUMBER, SMET.TRANSFER_COST, SMET.TRANSPORTATION_DIST_ACCOUNT, SMET.TRANSPORTATION_COST, SMET.TRANSFER_COST_DIST_ACCOUNT, SMET.WAYBILL_AIRBILL, SMET.FREIGHT_CODE, SMET.NUMBER_OF_CONTAINERS, SMET.VALUE_CHANGE, SMET.PERCENTAGE_CHANGE, SMET.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, SMET.ATTRIBUTE1, SMET.ATTRIBUTE2, SMET.ATTRIBUTE3, SMET.ATTRIBUTE4, SMET.ATTRIBUTE5, SMET.ATTRIBUTE6, SMET.ATTRIBUTE7, SMET.ATTRIBUTE8, SMET.ATTRIBUTE9, SMET.ATTRIBUTE10, SMET.ATTRIBUTE11, SMET.ATTRIBUTE12, SMET.ATTRIBUTE13, SMET.ATTRIBUTE14, SMET.ATTRIBUTE15, SMET.MOVEMENT_ID, SMET.TASK_ID, SMET.TO_TASK_ID, SMET.PROJECT_ID, SMET.TO_PROJECT_ID, SMET.SOURCE_PROJECT_ID, SMET.PA_EXPENDITURE_ORG_ID, SMET.SOURCE_TASK_ID, SMET.EXPENDITURE_TYPE, SMET.ERROR_CODE, SMET.ERROR_EXPLANATION, SMET.PRIOR_COSTED_QUANTITY, SMET.TRANSFER_PRIOR_COSTED_QUANTITY, SMET.FINAL_COMPLETION_FLAG, SMET.PM_COST_COLLECTED, SMET.PM_COST_COLLECTOR_GROUP_ID, SMET.SHIPMENT_COSTED, SMET.TRANSFER_PERCENTAGE, SMET.MATERIAL_ACCOUNT, SMET.MATERIAL_OVERHEAD_ACCOUNT, SMET.RESOURCE_ACCOUNT, SMET.OUTSIDE_PROCESSING_ACCOUNT, SMET.OVERHEAD_ACCOUNT, SMET.COST_GROUP_ID, SMET.TRANSFER_COST_GROUP_ID, SMET.FLOW_SCHEDULE, SMET.QA_COLLECTION_ID, SMET.OVERCOMPLETION_TRANSACTION_QTY, SMET.OVERCOMPLETION_PRIMARY_QTY, SMET.OVERCOMPLETION_TRANSACTION_ID, SMET.MVT_STAT_STATUS, SMET.COMMON_BOM_SEQ_ID, SMET.COMMON_ROUTING_SEQ_ID, SMET.ORG_COST_GROUP_ID, SMET.COST_TYPE_ID, SMET.PERIODIC_PRIMARY_QUANTITY, SMET.MOVE_ORDER_LINE_ID, SMET.TASK_GROUP_ID, SMET.PICK_SLIP_NUMBER, SMET.LPN_ID, SMET.TRANSFER_LPN_ID, SMET.PICK_STRATEGY_ID, SMET.PICK_RULE_ID, SMET.PUT_AWAY_STRATEGY_ID, SMET.PUT_AWAY_RULE_ID, SMET.CONTENT_LPN_ID, SMET.PICK_SLIP_DATE, SMET.COST_CATEGORY_ID, SMET.ORGANIZATION_TYPE, SMET.TRANSFER_ORGANIZATION_TYPE, SMET.OWNING_ORGANIZATION_ID, SMET.OWNING_TP_TYPE, SMET.XFR_OWNING_ORGANIZATION_ID, SMET.TRANSFER_OWNING_TP_TYPE, SMET.PLANNING_ORGANIZATION_ID, SMET.PLANNING_TP_TYPE, SMET.XFR_PLANNING_ORGANIZATION_ID, SMET.TRANSFER_PLANNING_TP_TYPE, SMET.SECONDARY_UOM_CODE, SMET.SECONDARY_TRANSACTION_QUANTITY, SMET.TRANSACTION_GROUP_SEQ, SMET.SHIP_TO_LOCATION_ID, SMET.RESERVATION_ID, SMET.TRANSACTION_MODE, SMET.TRANSACTION_BATCH_ID, SMET.TRANSACTION_BATCH_SEQ, SMET.INTRANSIT_ACCOUNT, SMET.FOB_POINT, SMET.PARENT_TRANSACTION_ID, SMET.LOGICAL_TRX_TYPE_CODE, SMET.TRX_FLOW_HEADER_ID, SMET.LOGICAL_TRANSACTIONS_CREATED, SMET.LOGICAL_TRANSACTION, SMET.INTERCOMPANY_COST, SMET.INTERCOMPANY_PRICING_OPTION, SMET.INTERCOMPANY_CURRENCY_CODE, SMET.ORIGINAL_TRANSACTION_TEMP_ID, SMET.TRANSFER_PRICE, SMET.EXPENSE_ACCOUNT_ID, SMET.COGS_RECOGNITION_PERCENT, SMET.SO_ISSUE_ACCOUNT_TYPE, SMET.OPM_COSTED_FLAG, SMET.MATERIAL_EXPENSE_ACCOUNT, SMET.TRANSACTION_EXTRACTED, SMET.XML_DOCUMENT_ID,
SMET.GLOBAL_NAME, SOURCE_DML_TYPE, SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, REFRESH_DATETIME, 
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CLOUD_MTL_MATERIAL_TRANSACT SMET
WHERE
 NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
WHERE COALESCE(SMET.GLOBAL_NAME, 'ERPCLOUD') =NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME ) /* Added Coalesce as part of Mar18th CBM rel*/
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRNSCTN_SOURCE_TYPE NMTST
WHERE SMET.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_ID = NMTST.SK_TRNSCTN_SOURCE_TYPE_ID_INT)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_TYPE NMTT
WHERE SMET.TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID = NMTT.SK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID_INT)
OR NOT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT  NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME, SM.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION SM, $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC  
WHERE  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SM.SS_CD ) SMT
WHERE SMET.TRANSACTION_ID = SMT.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT 	AND SMT.GLOBAL_NAME  =  COALESCE(SMET.GLOBAL_NAME, 'ERPCLOUD') )/* Added Coalesce as part of Mar18th CBM rel*/
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO   
WHERE	SMET.ORGANIZATION_ID = NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
--AND NCIO.SS_CODE IN ('CG','ERPCLOUD')
--AND NCIO.SS_CODE =SMET.GLOBAL_NAME /* Need to revisit*/
)
/*OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM   (SELECT SK_PURCHASE_ORDR_HEADER_ID_INT, NPO.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY, NPO.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM, NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
        FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER NPO , $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC  WHERE  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NPO.SS_CD )POK
		WHERE SMET.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_ID = POK.SK_PURCHASE_ORDR_HEADER_ID_INT AND --SMET.GLOBAL_NAME=POK.GLOBAL_NAME  
)
*/ /*Commented as part of Mar18th CBM rel*/
OR ( COALESCE(SMET.RCV_TRANSACTION_ID, 0) <> 0 AND /* Added as part of Mar18th CBM rel*/
 NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RECEIVING_TRANSACTION NRT
WHERE SMET.RCV_TRANSACTION_ID=SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
--AND NRT.SS_CD IN ('CG')
AND NRT.SS_CD  =COALESCE(SMET.GLOBAL_NAME, 'ERPCLOUD') /* Added Coalesce as part of Mar18th CBM rel*/
AND SMET.RCV_TRANSACTION_ID IS NOT NULL) )

SELECT  RANK () OVER (ORDER BY SMP.TRANSACTION_ID,SMP.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) + MAX_VAL MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY,
SMP.TRANSACTION_ID AS SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT, SMP.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
FROM  
 (SELECT COALESCE (MAX (MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY), 0) MAX_VAL  FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION) SMPO,
(SELECT SMET.TRANSACTION_ID, NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE FROM 
(SELECT CAST(TRANSACTION_ID AS BIGINT) AS TRANSACTION_ID, GLOBAL_NAME,TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_ID,CAST(TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID AS BIGINT) AS TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID ,CAST(INVENTORY_ITEM_ID AS BIGINT) AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,CAST(ORGANIZATION_ID AS BIGINT) AS ORGANIZATION_ID
                  FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_MTL_MATERIAL_TRANSACTI    

/* removed as part SJPROD retirement 
UNION ALL
SELECT TRANSACTION_ID, GLOBAL_NAME,TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_ID,TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID,INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,ORGANIZATION_ID
                  FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_MTL_MATERIAL_TRANSACT  */
UNION ALL
SELECT TRANSACTION_ID, GLOBAL_NAME,TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_ID,TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID,INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,ORGANIZATION_ID
                  FROM $$STGDB.ST_CLOUD_MTL_MATERIAL_TRANSACT

UNION ALL
SELECT CAST(TRANSACTION_ID AS BIGINT) AS TRANSACTION_ID, GLOBAL_NAME,TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_ID,CAST(TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID AS BIGINT) AS TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID ,CAST(INVENTORY_ITEM_ID AS BIGINT) AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,CAST(ORGANIZATION_ID AS BIGINT) AS ORGANIZATION_ID
                  FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION 
/* removed as part SJPROD retirement 				  
UNION ALL
SELECT TRANSACTION_ID, GLOBAL_NAME,TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_ID,TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID,INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,ORGANIZATION_ID
                  FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_MF_MTL_MATERIAL_TRANSACT  */
) SMET 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
                ON SMET.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRNSCTN_SOURCE_TYPE NMTST
                ON SMET.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_ID = NMTST.SK_TRNSCTN_SOURCE_TYPE_ID_INT
INNER JOIN  $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_TYPE NMTT
                ON SMET.TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID = NMTT.SK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO   
ON	SMET.ORGANIZATION_ID = NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
/*AND NCIO.SS_CODE='CG'	commented for R2R exception issue*/						
) SMP
WHERE NOT EXISTS 
(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION SPO WHERE SPO.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = SMP.TRANSACTION_ID AND SPO.SS_CD = SMP.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)

SELECT 
SMT.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY AS MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY,
SMET.ATTRIBUTE15 AS CIP_COMMENT,
SMET.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY  AS RU_TAN_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY, 
SMET.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY AS RU_NR2A_PRODUCT_INV_ORG_KEY, 
CASE WHEN SMET.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%' THEN -997 ELSE 
CASE WHEN SMET.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME='Sales order' AND NII.ITEM_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN NII.ITEM_KEY  
WHEN SMET.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME='Sales order' AND NII.ITEM_KEY IS  NULL THEN  COALESCE(SOL.PRODUCT_KEY,-997) 
WHEN SMET.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME='Purchase order' AND NII.ITEM_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN NII.ITEM_KEY 
WHEN SMET.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME='Purchase order' AND NII.ITEM_KEY IS NULL THEN  COALESCE(NSO_PO.PRODUCT_KEY,-997) 
ELSE COALESCE(NII.ITEM_KEY,-997)  END
END   AS RU_NR2A_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY,
CASE WHEN SMET.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%' THEN
CASE WHEN SMET.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME='Sales order' AND NII.ITEM_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN NII.ITEM_KEY  
WHEN SMET.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME='Sales order' AND NII.ITEM_KEY IS  NULL THEN  COALESCE(SOL.PRODUCT_KEY,-997) 
WHEN SMET.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME='Purchase order' AND NII.ITEM_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN NII.ITEM_KEY 
WHEN SMET.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME='Purchase order' AND NII.ITEM_KEY IS NULL THEN  COALESCE(NSO_PO.PRODUCT_KEY,-997) 
ELSE COALESCE(NII.ITEM_KEY,-997)  END
ELSE -997
END  AS RU_TAN_ITEM_KEY,
COALESCE(EMTR.REASON_NAME,'UNKNOWN')  AS REASON_CD,
COALESCE(SMET.ACTUAL_COST,0.00) AS ACTUAL_COST_USD_AMT,
SMET.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY AS RU_PRODUCT_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
CASE WHEN SMET.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%' THEN
		CASE WHEN SMET.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG='N' AND SMET.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME='Account alias' THEN COALESCE(CTO_R2A.PRODUCT_KEY,-997) ELSE COALESCE(R2ANII.ITEM_KEY,-997) END /* added by SC-LSS for R2A CTO Transactions */
	ELSE 
CASE WHEN SMET.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME='Sales order' AND NII.ITEM_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN NII.ITEM_KEY  
WHEN SMET.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME='Sales order' AND NII.ITEM_KEY IS  NULL THEN  COALESCE(SOL.PRODUCT_KEY,-997) 
WHEN SMET.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME='Purchase order' AND NII.ITEM_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN NII.ITEM_KEY 
WHEN SMET.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME='Purchase order' AND NII.ITEM_KEY IS NULL THEN  COALESCE(NSO_PO.PRODUCT_KEY,-997) 
ELSE COALESCE(NII.ITEM_KEY,-997)  END
END	
AS RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY,
SMET.TRANSACTION_DATE AS TRANSACTION_DTM,
SMET.R2A_STOCK_TYPE AS R2A_STOCK_TYPE,
COALESCE(NRGL.BK_GEOGRAPHIC_LOCATION_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS RU_BK_GEOGRAPHIC_LOCATION_CD,
COALESCE(SMET.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,0.00) AS TRANSACTION_QTY,
COALESCE(SMET.QUANTITY_ADJUSTED,0) AS ADJUSTED_QTY,
SMET.TRANSACTION_ID AS SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ,
CASE WHEN (SMET.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME IN ('Sales order', 'Purchase Order')) THEN SMET.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME ELSE 'OTHER' END AS REFERENCE_TYPE,
SMET.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY AS INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY,
NMTT.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME AS BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD ,
COALESCE(NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS LST_UPDTD_CISCO_WRKR_PARTY_KEY,
CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CASE WHEN (SMET.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME='Purchase order') THEN COALESCE(POK.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY,-99995) ELSE -99995 END AS RU_PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY,

/*priyavij: Added as a part of Q3FY16 BTS option class changes */
CASE WHEN (SMET.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME='Sales order') THEN COALESCE(SOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-7777) 
WHEN (SMET.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME='Purchase order') THEN COALESCE(NSO_PO.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-7777)
WHEN (SMET.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME ='Job or Schedule') THEN 
				CASE WHEN BTS_R2A.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT IS NOT NULL THEN BTS_R2A.SALES_ORDER_KEY  ELSE COALESCE(SOL_BTS.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-7777) END 
ELSE -7777 
END AS RU_SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
/*End of code change*/

/*
CASE WHEN (SMET.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME='Sales order') THEN COALESCE(SOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-7777) 
WHEN (SMET.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME='Purchase order') THEN COALESCE(NSO_PO.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-7777)
WHEN (SMET.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME ='Job or Schedule') THEN COALESCE(SOL_BTS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-7777)
ELSE -7777 END AS RU_SALES_ORDER_KEY,  */

/*priyavij: Added as a part of Q3FY16 BTS option class changes */
CASE WHEN (SMET.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME='Sales order') THEN COALESCE(SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-7777)
WHEN (SMET.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME='Purchase order') THEN COALESCE(NSO_PO.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-7777)
WHEN (SMET.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME ='Job or Schedule') THEN 
				CASE WHEN BTS_R2A.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT IS NOT NULL THEN BTS_R2A.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ELSE COALESCE(SOL_BTS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-7777) END
ELSE -7777 
END AS RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
/*End of code change*/

/*
CASE WHEN (SMET.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME='Sales order') THEN COALESCE(SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-7777)
WHEN (SMET.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME='Purchase order') THEN COALESCE(NSO_PO.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-7777)
WHEN (SMET.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME ='Job or Schedule') THEN COALESCE(SOL_BTS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-7777)
ELSE -7777 END AS RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, */

COALESCE(SMET.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME,
COALESCE(SMET.COSTED_FLAG,'N') AS COSTED_FLAG,
CAST(SMET.TRANSACTION_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_TRANSACTION_DT,
COALESCE(NSL.BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME,
COALESCE(SMET.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,'UNKNOWN') AS RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,
COALESCE(SMET.RECEIVING_TRANSACTION_KEY,-997) AS RECEIVING_TRANSACTION_KEY,
SMET.SOURCE_CREATE_DTM,
SMET.DV_SOURCE_CREATE_DT,
SMET.TRANSACTION_SET_ID AS EP_TRANSACTION_SET_ID_INT,
COALESCE(NSL_1.STOCK_LOCATOR_KEY,-999) AS STOCK_LOCATOR_KEY, /* Column Addition as part of Q2FY16 SC CSE */
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
(CASE WHEN NMT.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END) AS DML_TYPE
FROM
(
SELECT 
SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE, 
SCMT.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_ID, 
SCMT.TRX_SOURCE_LINE_ID, 
SCMT.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_ID, 
SCMT.ACTUAL_COST, 
SCMT.TRANSACTION_DATE, 
SCMT.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY, 
SCMT.TRANSACTION_ID, 
SCMT.GLOBAL_NAME, 
SCMT.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, 
SCMT.ORGANIZATION_ID, 
SCMT.TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID,
SCMT.REASON_ID,
SCMT.QUANTITY_ADJUSTED,
SCMT.ATTRIBUTE15,
SCMT.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
SCMT.COSTED_FLAG,
SCMT.SUBINVENTORY_CODE ,
CASE WHEN SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%'  THEN'R2A STOCK' ELSE 'NOT R2A STOCK' END AS R2A_STOCK_TYPE,
/*CASE WHEN SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%' */ /* Commented this logic to implement the new logic for CTO and BTS R2A Transaction */
CASE WHEN SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%' AND NCIO.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG='Y'
THEN SUBSTR(SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,INDEX(SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,'|')+1,CHARACTER_LENGTH(SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE)) 
ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS FIELD1,
/* CASE WHEN SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%' */ /* Commented this logic to implement the new logic for CTO and BTS R2A Transaction */
CASE WHEN SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%' AND NCIO.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG='Y'
THEN SUBSTR(FIELD1,INDEX(FIELD1,'|')+1,CHARACTER_LENGTH(FIELD1)) 
ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS FIELD2,
/* CASE WHEN SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%' */ /* Commented this logic to implement the new logic for CTO and BTS R2A Transaction */
CASE WHEN SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%' AND FIELD2 LIKE '%|%'  AND NCIO.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG='Y'
THEN SUBSTR(FIELD2,1,INDEX(FIELD2,'|')-1) 
/*ELSE 'UNKNOWN' */  /* this else part is commnted to avoid skewness */
END AS PRODUCT_ID,
/* CASE WHEN SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%' */  /* Commented this logic to implement the new logic for CTO and BTS R2A Transaction */
CASE WHEN SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%'  AND FIELD2 LIKE '%|%' AND NCIO.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG='Y'
THEN SUBSTR(FIELD2,INDEX(FIELD2,'|')+1,CHARACTER_LENGTH(FIELD1)) 
/*ELSE 'UNKNOWN' */  /* this else part is commnted to avoid skewness */
END AS RU_BK_GEOGRAPHIC_LOCATION_CD,

/*priyavij: Q3FY16 Added as a part of BTS option class*/
CASE WHEN SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%'  AND FIELD2 LIKE '%|%' AND NCIO.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG='Y'
THEN SUBSTR(FIELD2,INDEX(FIELD2,'|')+1,CHARACTER_LENGTH(FIELD2)) END AS FIELD3,

CASE WHEN SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%'  AND FIELD3 LIKE '%|%' AND NCIO.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG='Y'
THEN SUBSTR(FIELD3,INDEX(FIELD3,'|')+1,CHARACTER_LENGTH(FIELD3)) END AS FIELD4,

CASE WHEN SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%'  AND FIELD4 LIKE '%|%' AND NCIO.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG='Y'
THEN SUBSTR(FIELD4,1,INDEX(FIELD4,'|')-1) END AS BTS_R2A_SO_NUM,

CASE WHEN SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%'  AND FIELD4 LIKE '%|%' AND NCIO.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG='Y'
THEN SUBSTR(FIELD4,INDEX(FIELD4,'|')+1, CHARACTER_LENGTH(FIELD4)) END AS BTS_R2A_LINE_NUM,
/*End of code change*/

/* Added to derive the So-Num and So-Line Num from TRANSACTION_REFERENCE */
CASE WHEN SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%||%'  AND NCIO.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG='N' AND NMTST.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME='Account alias' 
THEN TRIM(SUBSTR(SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,INDEX(SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,'||')+2,(INDEX(SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,'-') -2 - INDEX(SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,'||'))))
WHEN SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%|%'  AND NCIO.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG='N'  AND NMTST.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME='Account alias' THEN TRIM(SUBSTR(SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,INDEX(SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,'|')+1,(INDEX(SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,'-') -1 - INDEX(SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,'|')))) 
END AS CTO_R2A_SO_NUM,
CASE WHEN SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%'  AND NCIO.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG='N' AND NMTST.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME='Account alias'  THEN
 SUBSTR(
 TRIM(SUBSTR(SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE, INDEX(SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,'-')+1, CHARACTER_LENGTH(SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE)-INDEX(SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,'-')) )
 ,INDEX(SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,1), INDEX(TRIM(SUBSTR(SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,
  INDEX(SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,'-')+1, CHARACTER_LENGTH(SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE)-INDEX(SCMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,'-')) ),'|'))
 END AS CTO_R2A_LINE_NUM, 
 /* End of code change */
RT.RECEIVING_TRANSACTION_KEY,
SCMT.CREATION_DATE AS SOURCE_CREATE_DTM,
CAST(SCMT.CREATION_DATE AS DATE) DV_SOURCE_CREATE_DT,
SCMT.TRANSACTION_SET_ID,
NMTST.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME,
NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,
NCIO.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG AS RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG,
COALESCE(SCMT.LOCATOR_ID,-999) AS LOCATOR_ID /* Column Addition as part of Q2FY16 SC CSE */
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_MTL_MATERIAL_TRANSACTI  SCMT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
ON	SCMT.ORGANIZATION_ID = NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRNSCTN_SOURCE_TYPE NMTST
ON SCMT.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_ID = NMTST.SK_TRNSCTN_SOURCE_TYPE_ID_INT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RECEIVING_TRANSACTION RT
ON SCMT.RCV_TRANSACTION_ID =RT.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
UNION ALL 
SELECT 
EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE ,
EMT.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_ID, 
EMT.TRX_SOURCE_LINE_ID, 
EMT.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_ID, 
EMT.ACTUAL_COST, 
EMT.TRANSACTION_DATE, 
EMT.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY, 
EMT.TRANSACTION_ID, 
EMT.GLOBAL_NAME, 
EMT.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, 
EMT.ORGANIZATION_ID, 
EMT.TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID,
EMT.REASON_ID,
EMT.QUANTITY_ADJUSTED,
EMT.ATTRIBUTE15,
EMT.LAST_UPDATED_BY ,
EMT.COSTED_FLAG,
EMT.SUBINVENTORY_CODE,
CASE WHEN EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%'  THEN'R2A STOCK' ELSE 'NOT R2A STOCK' END AS R2A_STOCK_TYPE,
/*CASE WHEN EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%' */ /* Commented this logic to implement the new logic for CTO and BTS R2A Transaction */
CASE WHEN EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%' AND( NCIO.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG='Y' OR EMT.TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID =36)
THEN SUBSTR(EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,INDEX(EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,'|')+1,CHARACTER_LENGTH(EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE)) 
ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS FIELD1,
/* CASE WHEN EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%' */ /* Commented this logic to implement the new logic for CTO and BTS R2A Transaction */
CASE WHEN EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%' AND ( NCIO.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG='Y' OR EMT.TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID =36) 
THEN SUBSTR(FIELD1,INDEX(FIELD1,'|')+1,CHARACTER_LENGTH(FIELD1)) 
ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS FIELD2,
/* CASE WHEN EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%' */ /* Commented this logic to implement the new logic for CTO and BTS R2A Transaction */
CASE WHEN EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%' AND FIELD2 LIKE '%|%'  AND ( NCIO.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG='Y' OR EMT.TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID =36) 
THEN SUBSTR(FIELD2,1,INDEX(FIELD2,'|')-1) 
/*ELSE 'UNKNOWN' */  /* this else part is commnted to avoid skewness */
END AS PRODUCT_ID,
/* CASE WHEN EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%' */  /* Commented this logic to implement the new logic for CTO and BTS R2A Transaction */
CASE WHEN EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%'  AND FIELD2 LIKE '%|%' AND ( NCIO.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG='Y' OR EMT.TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID =36) 
THEN SUBSTR(FIELD2,INDEX(FIELD2,'|')+1,CHARACTER_LENGTH(FIELD1)) 
/*ELSE 'UNKNOWN' */  /* this else part is commnted to avoid skewness */
END AS RU_BK_GEOGRAPHIC_LOCATION_CD,
/* Added to derive the So-Num and So-Line Num from TRANSACTION_REFERENCE */

/*priyavij: Q3FY16 Added as a part of BTS option class*/
CASE WHEN EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%'  AND FIELD2 LIKE '%|%' AND NCIO.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG='Y'
THEN SUBSTR(FIELD2,INDEX(FIELD2,'|')+1,CHARACTER_LENGTH(FIELD2)) END AS FIELD3,

CASE WHEN EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%'  AND FIELD3 LIKE '%|%' AND NCIO.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG='Y'
THEN SUBSTR(FIELD3,INDEX(FIELD3,'|')+1,CHARACTER_LENGTH(FIELD3)) END AS FIELD4,

CASE WHEN EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%'  AND FIELD4 LIKE '%|%' AND NCIO.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG='Y'
THEN SUBSTR(FIELD4,1,INDEX(FIELD4,'|')-1) END AS BTS_R2A_SO_NUM,

CASE WHEN EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%'  AND FIELD4 LIKE '%|%' AND NCIO.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG='Y'
THEN SUBSTR(FIELD4,INDEX(FIELD4,'|')+1, CHARACTER_LENGTH(FIELD4)) END AS BTS_R2A_LINE_NUM,
/*End of code change*/


CASE WHEN EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%||%'  AND NCIO.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG='N' AND NMTST.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME='Account alias' 
THEN TRIM(SUBSTR(EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,INDEX(EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,'||')+2,(INDEX(EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,'-') -2 - INDEX(EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,'||'))))
WHEN EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%|%'  AND NCIO.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG='N'  AND NMTST.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME='Account alias' THEN TRIM(SUBSTR(EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,INDEX(EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,'|')+1,(INDEX(EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,'-') -1 - INDEX(EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,'|')))) 
END AS CTO_R2A_SO_NUM,
CASE WHEN EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE LIKE '%R2A%'  AND NCIO.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG='N' AND NMTST.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME='Account alias'  THEN
 SUBSTR(
 TRIM(SUBSTR(EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE, INDEX(EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,'-')+1, CHARACTER_LENGTH(EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE)-INDEX(EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,'-')) )
 ,INDEX(EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,1), INDEX(TRIM(SUBSTR(EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,
  INDEX(EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,'-')+1, CHARACTER_LENGTH(EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE)-INDEX(EMT.TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,'-')) ),'|'))
 END AS CTO_R2A_LINE_NUM, 
 /* End of code change */
RT.RECEIVING_TRANSACTION_KEY,
EMT.CREATION_DATE AS SOURCE_CREATE_DTM,
CAST(EMT.CREATION_DATE AS DATE) DV_SOURCE_CREATE_DT,
EMT.TRANSACTION_SET_ID,
NMTST.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME AS BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME,
NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY AS INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,
NCIO.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG AS RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG,
COALESCE(EMT.LOCATOR_ID, -999) AS LOCATOR_ID /* Column Addition as part of Q2FY16 SC CSE */
FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION EMT 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
ON	EMT.ORGANIZATION_ID = NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRNSCTN_SOURCE_TYPE NMTST
ON EMT.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_ID = NMTST.SK_TRNSCTN_SOURCE_TYPE_ID_INT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RECEIVING_TRANSACTION RT
ON EMT.RCV_TRANSACTION_ID =RT.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
AND EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'
) SMET 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON SMET.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
INNER JOIN  $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_TYPE NMTT
ON SMET.TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID = NMTT.SK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID_INT 
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION SMT	
ON SMET.TRANSACTION_ID = SMT.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT 
AND SMT.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NII 
ON SMET.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = NII.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT 
AND SMET.ORGANIZATION_ID = NII.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM R2ANII
ON SMET.PRODUCT_ID=R2ANII.BK_PRODUCT_ID
AND SMET.ORGANIZATION_ID = R2ANII.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SUBINVENTORY_LOCATION NSL
ON SMET.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY = NSL.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY
AND SMET.SUBINVENTORY_CODE=NSL.BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME	
LEFT JOIN (SELECT ELT1.LINE_ID, ELT1.GLOBAL_NAME, ELT2.CMS_SOURCE_CODE,ELT2.CMS_SOURCE_LINE_ID ,NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LINES_EXT ELT1
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LINES_EXT ELT2
ON  COALESCE(ELT1.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID, ELT1.LINE_ID) = ELT2.LINE_ID
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSCC
ON ( NSSCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = (  CASE WHEN ELT2.CMS_SOURCE_CODE = 'SJOE.CISCO.COM' THEN  'QTC'
WHEN  ELT2.CMS_SOURCE_CODE= 'BV.CISCO.COM' THEN  'BV'    ELSE  'CG'  END ))
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL 
ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = COALESCE(ELT2.CMS_SOURCE_LINE_ID,ELT2.LINE_ID) 
AND NSOL.SS_CODE =  NSSCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
) SOL
ON SOL.LINE_ID = SMET.TRX_SOURCE_LINE_ID 
AND SOL.GLOBAL_NAME = SMET.GLOBAL_NAME

/* Added as part of Jan Release 2014*/

LEFT JOIN $$GGSRCVWDB.GG_CG1_WIP_FLOW_SCHEDULES WFS
ON  WFS.WIP_ENTITY_ID=SMET.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_ID
AND  WFS.DEMAND_SOURCE_TYPE = ' 2'
		
LEFT JOIN (SELECT ELT1.LINE_ID, ELT1.GLOBAL_NAME, ELT2.CMS_SOURCE_CODE,ELT2.CMS_SOURCE_LINE_ID ,NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LINES_EXT ELT1
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LINES_EXT ELT2
ON  COALESCE(ELT1.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID, ELT1.LINE_ID) = ELT2.LINE_ID
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSCC
ON ( NSSCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = (  CASE WHEN ELT2.CMS_SOURCE_CODE = 'SJOE.CISCO.COM' THEN  'QTC'
WHEN  ELT2.CMS_SOURCE_CODE= 'BV.CISCO.COM' THEN  'BV'    ELSE  'CG'  END ))
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL 
ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = COALESCE(ELT2.CMS_SOURCE_LINE_ID,ELT2.LINE_ID) 
AND NSOL.SS_CODE =  NSSCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
) SOL_BTS
ON SOL_BTS.LINE_ID = WFS.DEMAND_SOURCE_LINE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER POK
    ON SMET.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_ID = POK.SK_PURCHASE_ORDR_HEADER_ID_INT
    AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = POK.SS_CD
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
( SELECT NPOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY, NPR.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
       FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE NPOL
		INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT NPOLS
		ON ( NPOLS.PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NPOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
		INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE NPRL		
		ON ( NPOLS.PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY  = NPRL.PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY )		
		INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_REQUISITION NPR		
		ON ( NPR.BK_PURCHASE_REQUISITION_NUM   = NPRL.BK_PURCHASE_REQUISITION_NUM   )	
group by NPOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY, NPR.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
		) SPOK
ON  POK.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY  = SPOK.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY 
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_MTL_TRANSACTION_REAS EMTR
	ON SMET.REASON_ID = EMTR.REASON_ID 
	AND SMET.GLOBAL_NAME=EMTR.GLOBAL_NAME
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_USER EFU
    ON ( EFU.USER_ID= SMET.LAST_UPDATED_BY
	AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EFU.GLOBAL_NAME )
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP
    ON NCWP.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID = CAST(EFU.EMPLOYEE_ID AS VARCHAR(50) )
LEFT JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_R2_GEOGRAPHIC_LOCATION NRGL
	ON NRGL.BK_GEOGRAPHIC_LOCATION_CD=SMET.RU_BK_GEOGRAPHIC_LOCATION_CD 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSO_PO
	ON SPOK.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSO_PO.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY	
	/* Added this join condition as part of Q2FY16 SC CSE */
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_STOCK_LOCATOR NSL_1
ON NSL_1.SK_INV_LOC_ID_INT = SMET.LOCATOR_ID
AND NSL_1.SK_ORG_ID_INT = SMET.ORGANIZATION_ID
/* End of Join Condition */
LEFT JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION NMT
/*ON SMET.TRANSACTION_ID = NMT.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT 
AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NMT.SS_CD*/
/* above join was modified as below  for performance improvement*/
ON SMT.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY  = NMT.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY
LEFT JOIN (SELECT BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT, PRODUCT_KEY
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE
WHERE MAJOR_LINE_TYPE='MAJOR'  AND BK_OPTION_NUMBER_INT=0
AND ITEM_TYPE_CODE  IN ('STANDARD','MODEL')
GROUP BY 1,2,3) CTO_R2A
ON CTO_R2A.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT = SMET.CTO_R2A_SO_NUM
AND CTO_R2A.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT = SMET.CTO_R2A_LINE_NUM

/*priyavij: Added as a part of Q3FY16  BTS option class changes*/

LEFT JOIN (
SELECT BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT, PRODUCT_KEY,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, SALES_ORDER_KEY
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE
WHERE MAJOR_LINE_TYPE='MAJOR'  AND BK_OPTION_NUMBER_INT=0
AND ITEM_TYPE_CODE  IN ('STANDARD','MODEL')
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT ORDER BY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ASC) =1
) BTS_R2A
ON BTS_R2A.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT = SMET.BTS_R2A_SO_NUM
AND BTS_R2A.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT = SMET.BTS_R2A_LINE_NUM

/*End of code change*/


WHERE 1=2
